examples: Now, this apparent contradiction between geologic evidence and the stellar evolution model became known as the faint young Sun paradox.
The French companies are registering stellar profits.
Ultraviolet radiation and violent stellar winds have blown out an enormous cavity in the gas and dust enveloping the cluster.
Another newcomer fast gaining a stellar reputation is the funky, retro-styled Gilt Lounge.
Cocktails, conversations with fellow film buffs and dancing to Bollywood beats promise to make this a stellar evening.
